description: Model an 80x80x80 mm solid hydraulic manifold block positioned in the positive X, Y, and Z quadrant with one corner at the origin. Create three perpendicular holes through the block: a 10 mm diameter hole centered at X=20, Y=20 on the top face (Z=80); a 20 mm diameter hole centered at X=40, Z=40 on the front face (Y=0); and a 15 mm diameter hole centered at Y=40, Z=40 on the right face (X=80). Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/manifold_block.slvs.
